title: Concrete Extras
body:
![A full block showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed55bdd689ff38c92e8ac9eb493ef1ebac1358c4.png)

I wanted concrete to have more blocks and uses, so I gave them more.

I spent like a day coding in fabric using Kaupenjoe's guide(godsent) and am happy with the result

A big inspiration for some of the features came from Vanilla Tweaks.
